notes: Valheim Data — new Plantable item type covers the 17 sapling pieces (split out of Build Piece) plus seeds, crops, and plantable mushrooms (flagged plantable=true while keeping their primary Material/Food typing — Carrot still appears under Food, etc.). Build-Piece Materials view now skips the 9 Ashlands ruin pots whose ingredients aren't player-farmable, and ingredient names resolve via the canonical item record so manually-added entries like Red Pot Shard display properly instead of the raw $item_pot_shard_red token.
